Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

TCL 13, 247 [Sale of prebends in temple office, type broken][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

mdUTU-MU-MU ⸢DUMU⸣ [ša₂ ...] ⸢ina⸣ ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ šal-šu₂ ḪA.LA [...]

(o 1) Šamaš-šum-iddin, son [of ...], voluntarily has sold one-third of (his) share — [...] in the fourth day of the [...] prebend (which is) before Anu, Antu, Ištar, Nanaya and Beltu-ša-Reš, monthly for every year, the monthly offerings [...] that [...] of Šamaš-šum-iddin, son [of ...]-tu — for one-half manā of refined silver, [as] the complete price, to Rabi-Anu and his brother, sons of Anu-uballiṭ, in perpetuity.

o 22

ina U₄ 4-KAM₂ ⸢GIŠ.ŠUB.BA⸣ [...] IGI d60 an-tu₄ dINANA dna-na-a

o 33

u dGAŠAN-ša₂-SAG [...] ⸢ITI⸣us-su ⸢ša₂ kal MU.AN.NA⸣

o 44

⸢gu-uq-qa⸣-[ne₂-e ...] u x ša₂ ⸢x⸣ [...] MU-MEŠ ša₂ mdUTU-MU-MU DUMU ša₂ m[...]-⸢tu₄?⸣

o 55

a-na 1/2 MA.NA KU₃.BABBAR ⸢qa-lu-u₂⸣ [...] ⸢ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na⸣ mGAL-d60 u [ŠEŠ]-šu₂

o 66

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ md60-DINiṭ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ ⸢it-ta⸣-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 1/2 MA.NA

(o 6) That one-half mina of refined silver is the price of one-third of his share of that [...] ... Šamaš-šum-iddin received from Rabi-Anu and his brothers.

o 77

qa-lu-⸢u₂ ŠAM₂⸣ šal-šu₂ ḪA.LA-šu₂ ša₂ [...]-MEŠ-šu₂ MU-MEŠ ⸢x-MEŠ⸣ mdUTU-MU-MU

o 88

ina ŠU-MIN mGAL-d60 u ŠEŠ-MEŠ-šu₂ ma-ḫir a-di u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi šal-šu₂ ḪA.LA-šu₂

(o 8) When [there should be] a claim concerning the one-third of the share that is with [...], Šamaš-šum-iddin will clear it and to Rabi-Anu [...] he will give [...]. Twelve-fold it will be paid.

o 99

ša₂ KI [...] ⸢x x⸣ mdUTU-MU-MU u₂-mar-raq-ma a-na mGAL-d60

o 1010

u [...] ina-an-din a-di 12-[TA.AM₃] ⸢i⸣-ta-nap-pal

Reverse
rr undetermined number of lines broken
r 1'1'

[... UNUG]ki itiBARA₂ U₄ 16-KAM₂ MU 8-KAM

(r 1') [Scribe]. Uruk. Nisānu, day 16, year 8 Alexander (was) king of the lands.

r 2'2'

[...] m⸢a-lik⸣-sa-an-dar LUGAL KUR.KUR
